# Forge Studio — Optional Services Configuration
# Set to 'true' to enable a service, 'false' to disable.
# Changes take effect on next startup (scripts/start-stack.sh)

# Core infrastructure
litellm-proxy=true

# Vector database
qdrant=true

# MCP (Model Context Protocol)
mcp-sse=true
mcp-gateway-docker=true

# AI Lab Dashboard
ai-lab-dashboard=true
